category_title: Confident MLD student who uses digital tools for planning and proofing
scenario_title: Initial encounter with Soma Cube visual representation
minimal_context: The student is working with the teacher to reproduce shapes by creating a visual representation of the right side of a Soma Cube.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here are the Soma cubes. Please reproduce the shape by making a visual representation of the right side of the cube.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: These cubes are interesting. I will follow the explanation you just gave.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks at the right side of the cube) I am stuck on the visual representation of the right side.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should try next?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I want to stop and abandon this task. I don't have any other possibilities to try it in a different way.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here are the Soma cubes. Please reproduce the shape by making a visual representation of the right side of the cube.

STUDENT: These cubes are interesting. I will follow the explanation you just gave.

TUTOR: Go ahead and start.

STUDENT: (Looks at the right side of the cube) I am stuck on the visual representation of the right side.

TUTOR: What do you think you should try next?

STUDENT: I want to stop and abandon this task. I don't have any other possibilities to try it in a different way.

task.content: visual representation of the right Soma Cube side

context.environment: Initiation through Soma Cubes and reproducing Shapes during Sessions 1 & 2
context.materials: Soma cubes, GeoGebra 3D AR software and hardware

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: with the first problem encountered (visual representation of the right Soma Cube side)
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: seemed to have no additional strategies or possibilities to try in a different way

behavior_patterns.condition: When encountering initial problems in mathematics tasks
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Neither solving strategies were visible nor self-assurance in mathematics
behavior_patterns.internal_state: seemed to have no additional strategies or possibilities to try in a different way
